channel.title: 2026-05-22 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-22 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Spintronic Materials and Devices for Artificial Intelligence Applications
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Meiling Xu, Xin Yue, Jiajia Jian, Tao Li, Zheng Chai, Tai Min
Advanced Materials, Volume 38, Issue 29, 22 May 2026.

item.title: Upscaling DFT-trained machine-learning interatomic potential toward Quantum Monte Carlo accuracy: Sulfur-vacancy migration in monolayer MoS₂ as a testbed
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adam Hložný, Ján Brndiar, Ye Luo, Ivan Štich
arXiv:2605.22601v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We designed a procedure to train a machine learning interatomic potential (MLIP) at benchmark-quality quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) accuracy. To avoid the complexities of high-quality atomic force determination with the stochastic QMC methods, we use a multi-fidelity approach wherein high-level QMC energies are used alongside suitably processed low-level DFT atomic forces to train a QMC fine-tuned MLIP which significantly improves both the energetics and atomic forces over the baseline DFT-based MLIP. Fine-tuning is only applied to the readout layers of an equivariant message-passing MACE MLIP. We used sulfur mono- and multiple vacancies in monolayer MoS₂ as a testbed and demonstrate a near QMC accuracy of the model in a number of in- and out-of…

item.title: 量子机器学习用于锂离子电池容量衰减分析
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究将量子机器学习技术应用于锂离子电池容量退化分析，探索量子计算在电池状态预测与寿命评估中的潜力。具体算法框架与预测精度需查阅原文。

item.title: Virp: neural network-accelerated prediction of physical properties in site-disordered materials
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andy Paul Chen, Martin Hoffmann Petersen, Kedar Hippalgaonkar
arXiv:2605.22234v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Among metallic alloys, ceramics, and even common compounds such as water ice, it is usual to find materials in which crystalline order is expressed as a probability. In such cases, one or more sites within a crystal can be occupied by multiple elements or vacancies, according to a set of probabilities. These crystal structures remain inaccessible to common first-principles materials simulation methodologies, which assumes perfect crystal order. Workaround strategies to this limitation include quasirandom structures and cluster expansion. These methods are system-specific and computationally expensive as they rely on large scale Monte Carlo simulations of enlarged unit cells. To address these limitations, we propose a pipeline combining a per…

item.title: 基于遗传算法与深度学习的二维共价有机框架甲烷纯化材料设计
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作围绕二维假想共价有机框架材料展开，结合遗传算法与深度学习方法进行高通量筛选，旨在发现用于甲烷纯化的新型多孔材料。具体设计与性能评估细节需查阅原文。

item.title: 物理信息图神经网络用于CMS触发系统中横动量估计
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作提出物理信息图神经网络方法，用于大型强子对撞机CMS实验触发系统中的粒子横动量实时估计。具体网络架构与性能提升需查阅原文。

item.title: 面向嵌入式边缘计算应用的神经网络量化效应研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alperen Aksoy, Ilja Bekman, Vesselin Dimitrov, Qader Dorosti, Chimezie Eguzo, Sarah Fleitmann, Christian Grewing, Fabian Hader, Andre Zambanini, Stefan van Waasen
该工作研究了量化神经网络（QNN）在两种资源受限科学应用——半导体量子比特自动校准和科学粒子探测器中的部署。系统评估了训练后量化（PTQ）、量化感知训练（QAT）与超低位二值神经网络（BNN）在延迟与资源占用间的权衡；提出基于遗传算法的硬件约束学习方案用于不可微定制BNN训练，并实现可直接转换为VHDL的查找表BNN架构，达到10-15纳秒级推理延迟。

item.title: 基于声发射与机器学习检测单轴加载下合金的变形机制
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Yan Chen, Boyuan Gou, Yihao Gao, Songhua Xu, Xiangdong Ding
该工作结合声发射技术与机器学习方法，研究单轴加载条件下合金的变形机制识别。该方法为原位监测合金力学行为提供了智能化分析手段，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Mn₂Au/CoFeB双层中反铁磁序增强的磁阻尼
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Donghang Xie, Haozhe Wang, Zhe Zhang, Zishuang Li, Jiahua Lu, Ronghua Liu, Jun Du, Bo Liu, Yu Yan, Liang He, Jing Wu, Rong Zhang, Bo Liu, Tiejun Zhou, Yongbing Xu, Xuezhong Ruan
通过铁磁共振研究AFM/FM Mn₂Au/CoFeB双层磁动力学，发现2 nm厚Mn₂Au的Néel温度仅约40 K，与块体超过1000 K形成鲜明对比。Mn₂Au(2 nm)/CoFeB(4 nm)双层中，CoFeB磁阻尼α随温度从160 K降至10 K由0.013增至0.047，交换耦合场Hᵣₒₜ同步增大；该阻尼增强归因于Mn₂Au反铁磁序随温度降低而增强的AFM-FM交换耦合，促进了CoFeB向Mn₂Au的自旋角动量转移，为AFM/FM动力学调控提供深入认识。

item.title: Au(111)上单层FeCl₂铁磁性的原子尺度演示
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adriana E. Candia, Eliecer Peláez-Sifonte, Amitayush Jha Thakur, Sebastien E. Hadjadj, Samuel Kerschbaumer, Aymeric Saunot, Martina Corso, Maxim Ilyn, Jorge Lobo-Checa, Celia Rogero, David Serrate
该工作通过自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜明确证实了Au(111)上单层FeCl₂的铁磁有序。材料具有约3.3 eV的宽绝缘带隙和费米能级以上1.5 eV处出现的强自旋极化导带。三角形原子尺度缺陷在电子带隙和自旋密度分布中起关键作用，每个缺陷周围1.6 nm区域内导带被局域抑制且隧穿磁电导降低四倍。通过追踪自旋依赖隧穿电导随外加磁场的变化，实现了原子分辨的磁性表征。

item.title: Mo位Pb掺杂对极性磁体Fe₂Mo₃O₈磁性的影响
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Takumi Shirasaki, Taichi Ishikawa, Shungo Nakayama, Hideki Kuwahara
Fe₂Mo₃O₈是一种具有磁性Fe蜂窝晶格和非磁性Mo笼目晶格层状结构的极性磁体。本研究通过在Mo位引入非磁性Pb⁴⁺和Zr⁴⁺离子破坏Mo⁴⁺离子的自旋单态三聚体，发现Mo层中出现活跃自旋并产生室温铁磁性行为。定量分析表明每个被激活的Mo离子形成有效自旋S=1/2态，为设计室温磁电材料提供了新思路。

item.title: 低温下CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维磁性与磁热性能的增强
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Salma El Mouloua, Youness Hadouch, Salma Ayadh, Salma Touili, Daoud Mezzane, M barek Amjoud, Said Ben Moumen, Abdelhadi Alimoussa, Abdelilah Lahmar, Zvonko Jaglicic, Zdravko Kutnjak, Mimoun El Marssi
该工作研究溶胶-凝胶电纺技术制备的一维钴铁氧体CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维在低温和特定应用下的磁性与磁热性能。纳米纤维平均直径约210 nm，呈纯立方密堆积尖晶石结构(Fd-3m)。10-300 K温度范围内表现为铁磁性，室温饱和磁化强度达75.87 emu/g，矫顽力723 Oe。采用Maxwell方法间接测量磁熵变，该工作围绕低温磁热效应展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 铁电动态场驱动形核生长模型：面向预测性材料-电路协同设计
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yi Liang, Soohyeon Kim, Tony Chiang, Megan K. Lenox, Ian Mercer, John J. Plombon, Jon-Paul Maria, Jon F. Ihlefeld, Wenhao Sun, Wei Lu, John T. Heron
该工作针对传统KAI与NLS模型假设恒定电场的局限性，提出紧凑的动态场驱动形核生长(DFNG)模型。该模型可定量拟合多种铁电材料在任意电压波形下的开关瞬态，提取时变畴壁速度与生长维度，并耦合电路级仿真平台实现存储窗口、干扰误差、速度与能耗的材料-电路协同优化。

item.title: 铁电LaMoN₃中线性与非线性光学响应的光伏效率增强研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Surajit Adhikari, Sanika S. Padelkar, Jacek J. Jasieniak, Alexandr N. Simonov, Aftab Alam
该工作采用第一性原理方法系统研究了氧自由氮化物钙钛矿LaMoN₃在高压下的相稳定性、线性与非线性光学响应、激子及极化子行为。计算涵盖密度泛函理论、密度泛函微扰理论、多体微扰理论（G₀W₀和BSE）及紧束缚近似模型。研究表明LaMoN₃在40 GPa内保持动态稳定和单相结构，压力可系统调控电子结构以优化线性或非线性光学响应，该工作围绕高压下LaMoN₃的光电特性展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 交错磁体CrSb表面的约瑟夫森二极管与自旋阀效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 V. D. Esin, D. Yu. Kazmin, Yu. S. Barash, A. V. Timonina, N. N. Kolesnikov, E. V. Deviatov
该工作实验研究了超导铟电极与厚单晶交错磁体CrSb构成的In-CrSb及In-CrSb-In近邻器件中的电荷输运。双结器件中观测到dV/dI(B)曲线对零场的镜像对称性，呈现约瑟夫森自旋阀特征；同时通过直接测量外场中两个相反方向的临界电流，实现了约瑟夫森二极管效应。作者将上述现象归因于CrSb自旋极化拓扑表面态与体带交错磁自旋劈裂的联合作用。单界面处超导能隙在磁场中呈现类似Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov（FFLO）的振荡行为，有限动量库珀对与约瑟夫森二极管效应的要求完全兼容。

item.title: 三角晶格f波交错磁体中的非线性磁子磁矩输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Volodymyr P. Kravchuk, Kostiantyn V. Yershov, Bastián Pradenas, Robin R. Neumann, Rodrigo Jaeschke-Ubiergo, Ricardo Zarzuela, Jairo Sinova, Jeroen van den Brink, Alexander Mook
该工作研究了三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体受挫共面120度基态中的自旋激发，发现尽管基态子晶格磁矩无面外分量，其磁振子仍携带垂直于自旋有序平面的磁矩，系统表现为奇宇称f波磁体。将模型扩展至反铁磁耦合三角层堆叠，实现三维f波交错磁体中磁振子的理论构建。研究表明磁振子的非线性热输运效应（Edelstein效应和自旋分裂器效应）为f波交错磁体提供了清晰的实验探测特征。

item.title: 交错磁体中的非微扰磁轨道霍尔效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xukun Feng, Jin Cao, Lay Kee Ang, Shengyuan A. Yang, Cong Xiao, X. C. Xie
该工作揭示了交错磁体中一种非微扰于自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）强度的磁轨道霍尔效应，挑战了以SOC依赖度评判交错磁体现象重要性的常规认知。该效应在传统共线反铁磁体中严格禁戒，但在全部十种共线交错磁体自旋劳厄类中普适存在。反直觉的是，尽管由SOC诱导，其量级可达巨值，甚至超过非相对论自旋霍尔效应；交错磁对称性还允许非常规共线极化轨道电流，实现无外场调控垂直磁化。第一性原理计算预测实验已确立的交错磁体CrSb和FeSb2在室温下具有强响应。

item.title: 偏振中子衍射观测块体MnTe中交错磁序的翻转
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zheyuan Liu, Shinichiro Asai, Shingo Takahashi, Hiraku Saito, Taro Nakajima, Takatsugu Masuda
交错磁序以Néel矢量为特征，即使在非相对论极限下也破坏时间反演对称性。作者利用偏振中子衍射直接探测MnTe的交错磁序，观察到显著的核-磁干涉项，为块体晶体中存在净Néel矢量提供直接证据。同时发现源于相对论自旋-轨道耦合的弱铁磁矩与交错磁序耦合，二者均可通过毫特斯拉量级磁场冷却实现翻转。

item.title: 磁性可切换量子几何光电流的观测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Qi Tian, Zhuoliang Ni, Matthew Cothrine, David G. Mandrus, Eugene J. Mele, Andrew M. Rappe, Charles L. Kane, Fernando de Juan, Liang Wu
该工作首次在范德瓦尔斯反铁磁体中通过翻转Néel矢量实现了磁性可切换光电流的实验演示，证实了线性注入电流（探测量子度规）和圆偏振位移电流（探测几何挠率）的存在。特定频率和温度依赖性确认了圆偏振位移电流与线性注入电流的归属，建立了磁晶体中量子几何与体光伏效应的新关联。

item.title: 共线反铁磁多铁性材料中的奇宇称手性磁子：对称性分类与铁电开关
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Quanchao Du, Zhenlong Zhang Yuanjun Jin, Rui Li, Haibo Xie, Jinlian Lu, Zhe Wang, Zhijun Jiang, Lei Zhang, Jinyang Ni
识别一类共线反铁磁多铁性材料，其中子晶格内Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用诱导可通过铁电开关反转的奇宇称手性磁子；利用磁子电中性实现反铁磁绝缘体中非易失铁电调控的磁子自旋劈裂、霍尔输运与自旋极化。磁群分析与自旋波计算揭示手性劈裂呈f波、p波及全能隙三种平面奇宇称形式，并具有Néel矢量依赖特性；密度泛函理论验证从二维到体相的多种材料候选，为低耗散自旋电子器件提供新途径。

item.title: Spintronic Neuromorphic Hardware Using Domain Wall Based Neurons and Quantized Synapses
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sakshi Kiran Bandekar, Arnab Ganguly, Debanjan Polley, Debasis Das
arXiv:2605.22625v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this work, we simulate the functionality of artificial neuron and synapse using spin-orbit torque-based spintronic devices and implemented a fully connected artificial neural netwrok (ANN). These neuro-synaptic devices are emulated using transverse domain wall dynamics in a rectangular magnetic nanotrack comprised of heavy metal/ferromagnet (HM/FM) heterostructures. The ReLU activation function of the neuron has been mimicked using the domain wall motion induced by a 3 ns current pulse. The synapse has been modelled using current-induced domain wall (DW) dynamics through a corrugated HM/FM nanotrack under the influence of a 10 ns current pulse with varying current density. The semicircular corrugations are in the form of notches, which ar…

item.title: 反铁磁FeSn/Py异质结构中拓扑驱动的巨大有效自旋混合电导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kacho Imtiyaz Ali Khan, Nidhi Kandwal, Pankhuri Gupta, Deeksha Khandelwal, Akash Kumar, Johan Åkerman, Pranaba Kishor Muduli
首次研究外延FeSn/Py（Ni₈₀Fe₂₀）异质结构的自旋泵浦行为，报道有效自旋混合电导g↑↓eff达(116±7) nm⁻²，较标准Pt/Py体系高近一个数量级；3 nm Al插层使有效阻尼降低两倍，证实巨大g↑↓eff的界面起源，FeSn/Py体系逆自旋霍尔电压较Pt/Py参考膜堆高一个量级。该巨大g↑↓eff归因于Py层与外延FeSn拓扑活性[001]-kagome表面的直接界面接触，确立了拓扑活性界面对先进量子材料自旋电子器件的关键作用。

item.title: Altermagnetism and weak ferromagnetism
item.description:
📚 npj Quantum Materials
👤 Igor Solovyev, Sergey Nikolaev, Akihiro Tanaka
npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 22 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00900-9 Altermagnetism and weak ferromagnetism

item.title: 不对称氟化苯基4-联苯羧酸酯基元作为互变相铁电液晶的设计原则
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Hiroyuki Matsukizono, Koichiro Hayashi, Keiko Kojima, Yasushi Okumura, Hirotsugu Kikuchi
该工作提出以不对称氟化苯基4-联苯羧酸酯为分子设计基元，构建互变相铁电液晶材料。该设计策略对新型铁电液晶显示材料的开发具有指导意义，具体相变行为需查阅原文。

item.title: 自极化铁电Rashba半导体α-GeTe(111)薄膜的大面积生长：迈向CMOS兼容铁电自旋电子器件的关键一步
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Jules Lagrave, Nicolas Bernier, Thomas Jalabert, Yoann Brûlé, Damien Térébénec, Pierre Meilleur, Hervé Roussel, Jean‐Baptiste Dory, Oussama J. Mouawad, Thibault Chommaux, Cristian Mocuta, Dominique Thiaudière, Laurent Vila, Françoise Hippert, Pierre Noé
该工作实现了自极化铁电Rashba半导体α-GeTe(111)薄膜的大面积外延生长。该成果为开发与传统CMOS工艺兼容的铁电自旋电子器件奠定了材料基础，具体电学性能需查阅原文。

item.title: Orbital Multiferroicity in Two-Dimensional Triangular Lattice
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Jiangyu Zhao, Jiale Wang, Yibo Liu, Xinru Li, Ying Dai, Baibiao Huang, and Yandong Ma
Author(s): Jiangyu Zhao, Jiale Wang, Yibo Liu, Xinru Li, Ying Dai, Baibiao Huang, and Yandong Ma The search for multiferroicity in two-dimensional (2D) systems has predominantly focused on spin-driven mechanisms, leaving the distinct physics of coupled spin-orbital orders largely unexplored. Here, we propose a theoretical mechanism for orbital multiferroicity on 2D triangular lattices, arising … [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 206703] Published Fri May 22, 2026

item.title: 双极轴共生铁电体用于高效稳定的光催化全解水
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Pengwei Jia, Fang Chen, Xiaolei Zhang, Tong Chen, Xue Jiang, Tong Li, Haiyan Xie, Na Tian, Hongwei Huang
该工作围绕双极轴共生铁电材料的设计展开，旨在提升光催化全解水的效率与稳定性。具体机制与性能数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 顺磁性微晶粉末的晶粒形貌与堆积：基于固体核磁体磁化率位移的测量与计算
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
该研究发展傅里叶空间方法定量计算LiFePO₄的体磁化率（BMS）位移，利用⁷Li魔角旋转NMR谱直接探测晶粒形貌与尺寸。通过分离晶粒自身与近邻的外/内BMS贡献，证明粒子形状各向异性在NMR线形中留下可识别特征，实现形貌信息的定量提取。

item.title: Co掺杂NaSbO₃薄膜中局域CoO₆蜂窝结构诱导的类铁磁行为
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Hao-Bo Li, Weitao Yan, Shunsuke Kobayashi, Kousuke Ooe, Takahiro Ozawa, Hidefumi Takahashi, Shintaro Ishiwata, Chengchao Zhong, Tong Zhu, Wei-Hua Wang, Hiroshi Takatsu, Hiroshi Kageyama, and Hidekazu Tanaka
该工作围绕具有蜂窝晶格的强关联氧化物展开，这类材料因有趣的磁性行为及Kitaev自旋液体产生的马约拉纳费米子等涌现量子效应而备受关注。研究聚焦于Co掺杂NaSbO₃薄膜中由局域CoO₆蜂窝结构 motif 诱导出现的类铁磁行为，涉及高质量单晶样品的成分调控与物性表征，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 铁磁-反铁磁二嵌段共聚物中的磁场诱导相变
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
该研究构建具有Ising自旋的二嵌段共聚物模型，块内铁磁、块间反铁磁相互作用导致磁有序与空间组织的阻挫。通过平均场理论与蒙特卡洛模拟，发现丰富相图包括溶胀相、混合致密相、分离致密相及非对称“蝌蚪”相，外磁场可驱动相变。

item.title: 非均匀磁场中斯格明子晶体的磁振子边缘态
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 V. E. Timofeev and D. N. Aristov
该工作研究具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的薄膜铁磁体中，斯格明子规则晶格作为基态在外磁场增强时发生的磁振子拓扑转变。理论分析揭示了非均匀磁场下斯格明子晶体中磁振子边缘态的特性，涉及拓扑保护的边缘激发模式，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: CNN-Based Classifier for Automated Identification of Magnetic States in Spin Dynamics Simulations
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Amal Aldarawsheh, Ahmed Alia, Stefan Blügel
arXiv:2605.22125v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The identification and classification of different magnetic states are essential for understanding the complex behavior of magnetic systems. Traditional approaches that rely on handcrafted features or manual inspection often fall short, particularly when dealing with subtle or topologically complex spin textures. In this study, we present an automated deep learning model that employs an EfficientNetV1B0 Convolutional Neural Network to classify nine distinct magnetic states, including both ferromagnetic (FM) and antiferromagnetic (AFM) spin textures such as AFM skyrmions and AFM stripe domains. The spin configurations are generated through atomistic spin dynamics simulations using the Spirit code, then visualized with VFRendering to produce R…

item.title: Theory-Guided, Machine-Learning-Accelerated Discovery of a 3D Carbon Nested Nodal-Surface Semimetal
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shuaihua Zhang, Silei Guo, Jingxiang Liu, Baoxin Hu, Yanling Wu, Jun Li
arXiv:2605.22141v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Extending the Dirac physics of two-dimensional (2D) graphene into three dimensions (3D) carbon allotropes with higher-dimensional band degeneracies remains a central challenge in topological materials science. Here, we propose a general symmetry-engineering principle that systematically transforms graphene's Dirac cone into a 3D nodal surface via controlled layering and registry shift, and employ this principle to guide a machine-learning-accelerated inverse design. By integrating a crystal diffusion variational autoencoder(CDVAE) with a Crystal Transformer, we discover a novel, dynamically and mechanically stable carbon allotrope named Netsene (bct-C₂₄), which crystallizes in the body-centered tetragonal I4/mcm space group. First-principles…

item.title: MetaDNS: Enhancing Exploration in Discrete Neural Samplers via Well-Tempered Metadynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiaochen Du, Juno Nam, Jaemoo Choi, Wei Guo, Sathya Edamadaka, Junyi Sha, Elton Pan, Yongxin Chen, Molei Tao, Rafael Gómez-Bombarelli
arXiv:2605.21722v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sampling from discrete distributions with multiple modes and energy barriers is fundamental to machine learning and computational physics. Recent discrete neural samplers like MDNS suffer from mode collapse and fail to sample high-energy barrier regions between modes, which is critical for free energy estimation and understanding phase transitions. We propose Metadynamics Discrete Neural Sampler (MetaDNS), a general framework integrating well-tempered metadynamics into discrete diffusion or autoregressive samplers. By maintaining an adaptive, history-dependent bias potential along selected low-dimensional coordinates, MetaDNS forces exploration of previously inaccessible regions, enabling free energy reconstruction infeasible with standard n…

item.title: 手性超导的异常声电特征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. N. Osipov, V. N. Ivanova, V. M. Kovalev, I. G. Savenko
该工作提出将异常声电效应作为手性p波配对对称性的鲁棒替代光学探测手段。研究表明声波可诱导横向直流电流，在样品边界产生可测量的凝聚体相位差，源于无外磁场下准粒子的各向异性散射。准粒子介导的声电响应在临界温度附近占主导，且不受电子-空穴不对称因子抑制，为探测非常规配对提供了高灵敏度电学探针。

item.title: 陈-西蒙斯界面上的手性电磁表面波
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nemanja Kaloper
该工作证明，具有余维-1陈-西蒙斯界面的麦克斯韦理论即使在两侧均为常规真空电动力学的无限空间中，仍支持界面手性电磁表面波。通过精确求解边值问题，发现陈-西蒙斯相互作用对沿界面的两种螺旋度赋予相反符号，产生一种局域化的无能隙手性表面光子，具有线性色散及由陈-西蒙斯系数决定的频率无关折射率，无需周围材料响应或几何约束。

item.title: 杂化过渡金属硫族化合物中竞争非公度性、电子关联与超导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jean C. Souza, Moshe Haim, Lorenzo Crippa, Hyeonhu Bae, Edanel Fishbein, Jonathan Ruhman, Binghai Yan, Amit Kanigel, Roser Valentí, Nurit Avraham, Haim Beidenkopf
该工作利用扫描隧道显微镜揭示了体相过渡金属硫族化合物4Hb-TaS₂中交替1T和1H层之间出现的非公度势，及其与共存非公度电荷密度波的复杂耦合。结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论，研究表明晶格失配通过局域调制层间距调控关联1T层与金属1H层之间的杂化和电荷转移，驱动系统趋向掺杂Mott区，该工作围绕层间耦合与关联电子物理展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 扭曲纳米结构中非常规量子态的耦合线描述
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chen-Hsuan Hsu, Anna Ohorodnyk
该综述讨论耦合线描述在纳米尺度系统（特别是莫尔与扭曲结构）中的最新进展。一维通道构成的耦合线网络可承载超导、电荷密度波、量子自旋霍尔态、量子反常霍尔态及其分数化对应物等丰富物态，且可通过电学手段连续调控相互作用、限域与耦合强度。

item.title: 分数量子霍尔态中边缘激发的横向近场直接观测及相关慢次级动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yunhyeon Jeong, Akinori Kamiyama, John N. Moore, Takaaki Mano, Ken-ichi Sasaki, Yuuki Sugiyama, Tokiro Numasawa, Masahiro Hotta, Go Yusa
该工作利用频闪时间分辨光致发光显微和光谱技术，揭示了ν=1/3分数量子霍尔态中边缘激发的横向近场。时间分辨y-t图谱显示边缘磁等离激元通过台面边界时，体区横向产生超过30 μm的即时PL响应，识别为非辐射准静电近场。同时还观测到与即时横向近场响应不同的次级体区响应，表明电激发边缘激发在体区产生时间尺度分离的动力学过程。

item.title: 独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃中的涌现磁序与电荷有序相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ashutosh Anand, Mukul Kabir
基于密度泛函理论研究独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃的本征性质，揭示随厚度演化的磁相变序列：从单层条纹反铁磁直至恢复类体相C-AFM。四层以上极性灾难驱动的电荷转移掺杂表面层，产生条纹AFM与铁磁表面态而中心层保持类体相。空穴掺杂单层研究进一步发现掺杂驱动系统进入铁磁态并诱导电荷有序：0.5 h/fu处出现条纹电荷有序，0.25 h/fu处出现3:1条纹超结构，表明超结构周期性随掺杂浓度变化，为关联电子体系多场调控提供新视角。

item.title: 量子环中Hubbard相互作用对磁通驱动环流作用的精确与平均场分析
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rahul Samanta, Santanu K. Maiti, Shreekantha Sil
该工作采用精确对角化和Hartree-Fock平均场方法，系统研究了有序和无序Hubbard量子环中磁通驱动的持续环流。引入线性表形式构建完整多体哈密顿量，分析了在位及扩展Hubbard相互作用、无序和电子填充对持续电流的影响：有序环中在位排斥使电流单调递减，扩展相互作用的影响强烈依赖于填充因子；无序显著改变这些行为，尤其在低于四分之一填充时扩展相互作用可增强电流。逆参与比分析进一步揭示了本征态局域化特性的关键作用。

item.title: 中子星中微子冷却产生量子湍流
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 J. A. Sauls
该工作考虑年轻中子星在非平衡中微子冷却条件下超流态的形成，基于Kibble-Zurek机制（KZM）讨论拓扑缺陷的产生。中子星内壳与大部分液核为超流中子、超导质子与相对论电子的量子液体混合物，其中子超流涡旋与质子超导磁通线是拓扑缺陷。作者从接近T_c的库珀对涨落传播子出发，推导缺陷形成的标度关系，并基于Urca与修正Urca冷却机制计算核区预期涡旋密度。

item.title: 瑞利涡度浴中的回转磁量子摩擦
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mamoru Matsuo, Ryotaro Sano, Ai Yamakage, Hiroshi Funaki, Tatsuhiko N. Ikeda
该工作识别了表面自旋与瑞利波涡度回转磁耦合产生的本征零温弛豫通道。该表面模式贡献无需热声子，由瑞利涡度而非材料特定g因子调制决定。瑞利涡度浴具有超欧姆特性且随深度衰减，产生自旋弛豫的磁场和深度标度关系，为浅层自旋传感器和混合表面声波自旋界面探测固体中的瑞利波声量子摩擦提供了依据。

item.title: 大味数途径实现枫叶晶格上稳定的U(1)狄拉克自旋液体
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yunchao Zhang, Andreas Feuerpfeil, Subir Sachdev, Ronny Thomale, Yasir Iqbal
U(1)狄拉克自旋液体为阻挫磁体提供有用的理论框架，但其作为二维自旋哈密顿量稳定基态的存在性仍存疑，因紧致规范场的单极子事件可导致自旋子禁闭。作者发现枫叶晶格为此问题提供独特途径：其狄拉克自旋液体实现含N_f=12个狄拉克费米子的QED₃，远超三角和笼目晶格的N_f=4。在完整微观对称群下分类基本单极子，发现五个电荷为一、自旋单态且对晶格对称性、时间反演和自旋转动平庸的单极子；该相的稳定性取决于这些允许单极子是否动力学无关。

item.title: 留意鸿沟：通往量子优势的艰险之路
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jens Eisert, John Preskill
该工作识别了从当前含噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备迈向未来容错应用规模量子（FASQ）机器道路上的四大相关障碍：从误差缓解到主动误差检测与纠正、从初级纠错到可扩展容错、从早期启发式算法到成熟可验证算法、以及从探索性模拟器到量子模拟的可信优势。针对这些转变将加速迈向广泛实用量子计算的进程。

item.title: 利用护城河结构缓解超导电子学中的磁通俘获
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rohan T. Kapur (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Sergey K. Tolpygo (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Alex Wynn (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Pauli Kehayias (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Adam A. Libson (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Collin N. Muniz (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Michael J. Gold (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Justin L. Mallek (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Danielle A. Braje (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA), Jennifer M. Schloss (MIT Lincoln Laboratory, Lexington, MA, USA)
该工作系统研究了超导铌薄膜中护城河（moat）阵列对磁通（涡旋）俘获的抑制效果，考察了几何参数（尺寸、形状、密度）及背景磁场的影响。通过测量涡旋排出场，估计了不同几何构型的磁通饱和数与俘获温度。研究表明多数设计可在磁屏蔽环境（<1 μT）中有效隔离磁通，高长宽比矩形狭缝护城河以最小面积代价提供最强抑制；但非理想薄膜中涡旋仍优先钉扎于材料缺陷，单独使用护城河无法完全消除俘获。结果为超导集成电路磁通缓解提供设计指导，强调需联合优化电路几何与材料。

item.title: 双层体系中层间激子量子几何偶极在反向流电导中的特征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fanuel I. Mendez, Luis Brey, H. A. Fertig
该工作研究双层体系中受驱层间激子的反向流电流，以此探测其量子几何偶极（QGD）结构。作者以一维周期势与强垂直磁场下的磁激子能带为例，采用包含带间隧穿的玻尔兹曼输运方法，展示层对称驱动场的线性响应如何提供QGD信息。该结构区别于均匀体系的激子QGD，为非平衡动量分布下的量子几何性质提供了可观测探针。

item.title: 拓扑半金属：表面输运与自旋效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 E. V. Deviatov
综述拓扑半金属（特别是Weyl半金属作为最具代表性的半金属类型）的电荷与自旋输运实验研究，涵盖超导近邻器件中的电荷输运、自旋依赖输运及拓扑表面态的磁响应。Weyl半金属具有线性色散的拓扑保护手性表面态（类似Chern绝缘体而非拓扑绝缘体的螺旋表面态），可视为三维量子霍尔效应体系；其表面态的自旋-动量锁定使其在自旋相关效应方面具有独特研究价值，而输运研究的核心挑战在于揭示能隙体态中表面态的贡献。

item.title: 用于范德华超导体的TaOₓ结隧穿谱
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yixuan Niu, Jun Cheng, Shiji Ding, Zhongxin Guo, Shang Wang, Chenglong Li, Meining Zhang, Peng Cai
隧穿光谱学对阐明量子材料复杂电子结构和涌现现象至关重要，但高质量变温变场测量仍具挑战。作者采用磁控溅射制备了基于TaOₓ的高质量平面隧穿结平台，以范德华超导体Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ为基准，获得高质量隧穿谱，复现了超高真空原子洁净表面扫描隧穿谱的电子特征。该架构可在宽温度磁场范围内实现高精度光谱测量，为探测二维系统电子结构提供通用策略。

item.title: 超导铜氧化物带材临界电流的物理理解
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Charles Simon
该工作针对超导线圈制造中铜氧化物带材临界电流及其对磁场、温度、角度依赖关系的参数化难题，提出采用Mathieu/Simon（MS）模型分析现有数据。该模型强调表面钉扎机制在YBaCuO相图大部分区域的主导作用，与通常假设的强/弱体钉扎机制不同，能准确预测多种观测特征。尽管MS模型二十年前已发表且获部分物理学家认可，但在工程领域仍鲜为人知，该工作旨在推动其标准化表征应用。

item.title: 基于光热重编程技术的集成驱动-传感多模态磁驱动软体机器人
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Liu Yang, Yuliao Dong, Kangning Li, Cheng Jing, Ben Wang, Lin Xu
该工作开发了一种多模态磁驱动软体机器人，通过光热重编程技术实现驱动与传感功能的集成。该设计提升了软体机器人的环境适应性与智能交互能力，具体性能参数需查阅原文。

item.title: 激光辅助折叠与磁化制备微型化三维磁力传感器以增强机器人灵巧性
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Yujie Huang, Huangzhe Dai, Chengqian Zhang, Daofan Tang, Xinxin Zhang, Haonan Sun, Annan Ding, Xuebin Ni, Yizhi Zhang, Chengfeng Pan, Peng Zhao
该工作采用激光辅助折叠与磁化工艺制备微型化三维磁力传感器，用于增强机器人的灵巧操作能力。该传感器在微型机器人触觉反馈系统中的应用前景有待进一步验证，具体灵敏度指标需查阅原文。

item.title: 面向天基数据中心的混合经典-量子学习：CUDA-Q变分与光子后端研究
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Santanu Ganguly
该工作研究了10节点光学天基数据中心（SBDC）在30秒路由表刷新周期下的混合经典-量子路由问题，评估量子增强子程序在真实延迟约束下的表示学习能力。基于消息传递神经网络骨干，在统一CUDA-Q工作流中比较了经典基线、光子采样启发式节点编码器、qpp-cpu与nvidia上的变分量子电路（VQC）节点编码器、以及ORCA风格光子边增强五种后端。结果显示光子后端在低延迟区达到最高路由精度（约0.60），而VQC后端延迟高两到三个数量级且精度更低。

item.title: Neural canonical transformation for the spectra of fluxional molecule CH+ 5
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Ruisi Wang, Qi Zhang and Lei Wang
Protonated methane, , is a highly fluxional molecule with large spatial motions of the hydrogen atoms. The molecule’s anharmonic effects and the delocalized wavefunction of the hydrogen atoms significantly affect the excitation spectrum of the molecule. The neural canonical transformation (NCT) approach, which we previously developed to solve the vibrational spectra of molecules and solids, is a powerful method that effectively treats nuclear quantum effects and anharmonicities. Using NCT with wavefunctions in atomic coordinates rather than normal coordinates, we successfully calculate the ground and excited states of . We found that the wavefunctions for the ground state, as well as for low- and high-energy excited states, show preferences for the three stationary points on the potential…

item.title: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials: Advancing Open-Source Software for Efficient and Scalable Molecular Simulation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Christoph Brunken, Titouan Cormier, Lucien Walewski, Marco Carobene, Yessine Khanfir, Zachary Weller-Davies, Miguel Bragança, Armand Picard, Adrien Pichard, Leon Wehrhan, Heloise Chomet, Eszter Varga-Umbrich, Marie Bluntzer, Massimo Bortone, Valentin Heyraud, Silvia Acosta-Gutiérrez, Jules Tilly, Olivier Peltre
arXiv:2605.22698v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable atomistic simulations with near ab initio accuracy at significantly reduced computational cost, but their broader adoption is often limited by fragmented tooling, limited scalability, and inflexible software design. We present mlip v2, a new generation of the mlip library that advances efficient and scalable molecular simulation through a unified and extensible framework. The new release features a targeted API redesign with improved modularity and control, enabling flexible customization of training, data processing, and simulation workflows. It further integrates a new high-performance backend for equivariant operations, e3j, significantly accelerating model inference and simulations.…

item.title: UWSDF-UIoT: Underwater Acoustic Context-Aware Deep Fusion Framework for Secure Data Transmission in Underwater IoT Networks
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Anwar Ali Sathio, Abdul Aziz, Raja Vavekanand, Mujtaba Sultani
UIoT network plays a vital role in underwater monitoring, environment assessment, and infrastructure research. UIoT communication constrains due to high propagation delay, multipath fading, and broadcast channel performances, which leads vulnerability to eavesdropping, data tampering, replay attacks, and node compromise. The existing security models of terrestrial IoT systems fail to address the communications constraints effectively. In the research study, we propose UWSDF-UIoT, an adaptive multi-layer deep fusion security framework that enables reliable and secure data transmission and blockchain based transaction validation in underwater IoT networks. In the proposed design, we integrate Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM), Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Multi-Head Atte…

item.title: A Diffusive Classification Loss for Learning Energy-based Generative Models
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 RuiKang OuYang, Louis Grenioux, José Miguel Hernández-Lobato
arXiv:2601.21025v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Score-based generative models have recently achieved remarkable success. While they are usually parameterized by the score, an alternative way is to use a series of time-dependent energy-based models (EBMs), where the score is obtained from the negative input-gradient of the energy. Crucially, EBMs can be leveraged not only for generation, but also for tasks such as compositional sampling or building Boltzmann Generators via Monte Carlo methods. However, training EBMs remains challenging. Direct maximum likelihood is computationally prohibitive due to the need for nested sampling, while score matching, though efficient, suffers from mode blindness. To address these issues, we introduce the Diffusive Classification (DiffCLF) objective, a…

item.title: Mesoscale hydrogen-bond network engineering controls quantum-coherent proton transport to suppress aluminum corrosion
item.description:
📚 AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
👤 Hao Cheng, Zheng Li, Guoxuan Li, Zibo Chen, Jiebin Zheng, Zhengwei Kang, Cong Huang, Wei Zhang, Hui Ying Yang, Zhongliang Tian
Science Advances, Volume 12, Issue 21, May 2026.

item.title: 单层与双层联苯网络中Fe吸附及其对力学和电学性质影响的第一性原理研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiao-Ke Zhang, Zheng-Zhe Lin
该工作系统研究了Fe原子在单层和双层联苯网络(BPN)上的吸附特性。结构优化和吸附能分析表明，单层BPN中Fe吸附随覆盖度增加而增强，最稳定构型为Fe/C比50%；双层BPN中Fe优先吸附于层间四元环中心。力学性质计算显示单层和双层BPN均具有较高的面内杨氏模量和剪切模量，Fe吸附对面内力学性质影响较小，面内刚度主要由碳骨架本征结构决定。

item.title: 具有定制介孔孔道结构的纳米限域单原子网络用于稳定类芬顿催化
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yueping Bao, Yunlu Cao, Lifang Zhai, He Zhang, Xinying Chen, Zhengkun Wang, Menglu Zhang, Ying Luo, Yan Meng, Wen‐Wei Li, Wei Chen
该工作设计了一种介孔孔道结构可调的纳米限域单原子网络催化剂，用于稳定类芬顿反应。该材料在环境催化领域的应用潜力有待进一步探究，具体性能需查阅原文。
